news-global-soc.title: Iran regime could 'fall pretty soon,' Victor Davis Hanson says, as global tide turns
news-global-soc.description: Historian Victor Davis Hanson said Iran’s regime could fall within weeks as the U.S. deployed roughly 2,500 Marines amid escalating tensions in the Strait of Hormuz.
